description: You are an architect conducting a solar path study for a new building project on Strandvägen in central Stockholm, Sweden (59.33°N, 18.07°E). Document the sun's position at solar noon (12:00 UTC) on three key dates: the Summer Solstice (June 21, 2024), the Winter Solstice (December 21, 2024), and the Spring Equinox (March 20, 2024). For the analysis, ensure the atmosphere and ground are disabled, while the azimuthal coordinate grid and cardinal direction labels are enabled. Capture screenshots of the centered sun for each date to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Finally, write a solar study report to /home/ga/Desktop/solar_study_report.txt documenting the building site location, the three simulated dates, the use of the azimuthal grid, and the purpose of the study.
